data.description: Uniframe aluminium windows & doors by Prominance — precision 6063-T6 alloy sliding, casement & fold-slide systems. 25-year performance warranty, 100+ colours, pan-India delivery. Get free quote.

  <!-- Google Ads Conversion: LS - INDIA - ALUMINIUM -->
  <!-- Fires when the lead form is successfully submitted (intercepts XHR + fetch to lead_handler) -->
  <script>
  (function(){
    var _convFired = false;
    function _fireConversion(){
      if(_convFired) return;
      _convFired = true;
      try{
        //gtag('event','conversion',{'send_to':'AW-875793900/QOnRCJzY8fwbEOybzqED'});

      try{ if(typeof fbq!=='undefined') fbq('track','Lead'); }catch(e){}
    }
    // XHR intercept
    var _xOpen = XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open;
    XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open = function(m,u){
      this._csUrl = u; return _xOpen.apply(this,arguments);
    };
    var _xSend = XMLHttpRequest.prototype.send;
    XMLHttpRequest.prototype.send = function(){
      var x = this;
      if(x._csUrl && x._csUrl.indexOf('lead_handler')!==-1){
        x.addEventListener('load',function(){ if(x.status>=200&&x.status<300) _fireConversion(); });
      }
      return _xSend.apply(this,arguments);
    };
    // Fetch intercept
    var _oFetch = window.fetch;
    window.fetch = function(resource,init){
      var url = typeof resource==='string'?resource:(resource&&resource.url)||'';
      var p = _oFetch.apply(this,arguments);
      if(url.indexOf('lead_handler')!==-1){

      }
      return p;
    };
  })();

	!function(f,b,e,v,n,t,s)

  <!-- Robust scroll lock manager (counter-based, no unlock conflicts) -->
  <script>
  (function(){
	let lockCount = 0;
	let savedY = 0;

	function scrollbarWidth(){
	  return Math.max(0, window.innerWidth - document.documentElement.clientWidth);
	}

	window.lockScroll = function(){
	  lockCount++;
	  if(lockCount !== 1) return;

	  savedY = window.scrollY || window.pageYOffset || 0;

	  const sbw = scrollbarWidth();
	  if(sbw > 0) document.body.style.paddingRight = sbw + 'px';

	  document.documentElement.classList.add('no-scroll');

	  /*document.body.style.position = 'fixed';
	  document.body.style.top = '-' + savedY + 'px';
	  document.body.style.left = '0';
	  document.body.style.right = '0';
	  document.body.style.width = '100%';*/
	};

	window.unlockScroll = function(){
	  if(lockCount <= 0) return;
	  lockCount--;
	  if(lockCount !== 0) return;

	  var restoreY = savedY;

	  document.documentElement.classList.remove('no-scroll');

	  /*document.body.style.position = '';
	  document.body.style.top = '';
	  document.body.style.left = '';
	  document.body.style.right = '';*/
	  document.body.style.width = '';
	  document.body.style.paddingRight = '';
	  document.body.style.overflow = '';

	  window.scrollTo({top: restoreY, left: 0, behavior: 'instant'});

	  requestAnimationFrame(function(){
		window.scrollTo({top: restoreY, left: 0, behavior: 'instant'});
	  });
	};
  })();
  </script>

  <style>
	:root{
	  --navy:#0b2238;
	  --ink:#0f172a;
	  --muted:#526070;
	  --bg:#ffffff;
	  --soft:#f5f7fa;

	  --brand:#4060AC;
	  --brand2:#2B3480;

	  --radius:18px;
	  --radius2:14px;
	  --max:1200px;

	  --shadow:0 18px 55px rgba(2,6,23,.10);
	  --shadow2:0 10px 30px rgba(2,6,23,.08);

	  --font:"Manrope", system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
	}

	*{ box-sizing:border-box; }
	html,body{ height:100%; }
	body{
	  margin:0;
	  font-family:var(--font);
	  color:var(--ink);
	  background:var(--bg);
	  overflow-x:hidden;
	  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
	  -moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
	  line-height:1.55;
	}
	a{ color:inherit; text-decoration:none; }
	img{ max-width:100%; display:block; }
	.container{ max-width:var(--max); margin:0 auto; padding:0 18px; }
	@media (max-width:980px){
		.container{ max-width:var(--max); margin:0 auto; padding:0 14px; }
	}

	img, .hero-slide, .g img, .vthumb img, .imgcard img, .prod-media img{
	  -webkit-user-drag:none;
	  user-drag:none;
	}

	/* HEADER */
	.header{
	  position:sticky; top:0; z-index:90;
	  background:rgba(255,255,255,.88);
	  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
	  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.08);
	}
	.header-inner{
	  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px;
	  padding:12px 0;
	}
	.brand{ display:flex; align-items:center; flex:0 0 auto; }
	.brand img{ height:46px; width:auto; object-fit:contain; }

	.nav{
	  margin-left:auto;
	  display:flex; gap:14px; align-items:center;
	  font-weight:800; font-size:13.5px;
	  color:rgba(15,23,42,.85);
	  white-space:nowrap;
	}
	.nav a{
	  padding:8px 10px;
	  border-radius:999px;
	  transition:background .15s ease;
	}
	.nav a:hover{ background:rgba(15,23,42,.05); }

	.header-cta{
	  display:flex; gap:10px; align-items:center;
	  margin-left:10px;
	}
	.btn{
	  display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:10px;
	  border:0; cursor:pointer;
	  border-radius:999px;
	  padding:12px 16px;
	  font-weight:900;
	  font-size:14px;
	  transition:transform .12s ease, box-shadow .2s ease, background .2s ease;
	  background:var(--brand);
	  color:#fff;
	  box-shadow:0 14px 40px rgba(64,96,172,.22);
	  font-family:var(--font);
	}
	.btn:hover{ transform:translateY(-1px); }
	.btn.ghost{
	  background:transparent;
	  color:var(--navy);
	  border:1.5px solid rgba(11,34,56,.18);
	  box-shadow:none;
	}
	.btn.ghost:hover{ background:rgba(11,34,56,.05); }

	.menu-btn{
	  display:none;
	  width:44px; height:44px; border-radius:14px;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.12);
	  background:#fff;
	  box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(2,6,23,.08);
	  cursor:pointer;
	  align-items:center; justify-content:center;
	}

	@media (max-width:980px){
	  .nav{ display:none; }
	  .menu-btn{ display:inline-flex; }
	  .header-cta .btn.ghost{ display:none; }
	  .brand img{ height:30px; }
	  .header-inner{ justify-content:space-between; }
	  .header-cta{ margin-left:auto; }
	}

	/* Mobile menu */
	.mnav-backdrop{
	  position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:140;
	  background:rgba(2,6,23,.60);
	  backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
	  display:none;
	  padding-top:84px;
	}
	.mnav-backdrop.show{ display:block; }
	.mnav{
	  width:min(560px, 92vw);
	  margin:0 auto;
	  background:#fff;
	  border:1px solid rgba(2,6,23,.10);
	  border-radius:18px;
	  box-shadow:0 20px 55px rgba(2,6,23,.25);
	  overflow:hidden;
	}
	.mnav .top{
	  display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
	  padding:14px 14px;
	  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(2,6,23,.08);
	  font-weight:900;
	}
	.mnav .top button{
	  width:40px; height:40px; border-radius:12px;
	  border:1px solid rgba(2,6,23,.12);
	  background:#fff; cursor:pointer;
	}
	.mnav .links{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; padding:10px; }
	.mnav .links a, .mnav .links button{
	  padding:12px 12px;
	  border-radius:14px;
	  font-weight:900;
	  color:rgba(15,23,42,.92);
	  text-align:left;
	  background:transparent;
	  border:0;
	  cursor:pointer;
	  font-size:14px;
	  font-family:var(--font);
	}
	.mnav .links a:hover, .mnav .links button:hover{ background:rgba(2,6,23,.05); }

	/* Sections */
	section{ padding:72px 0; }
	.section-head{ text-align:center; }
	.kicker{
	  display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
	  padding:8px 12px;
	  border-radius:999px;
	  background:rgba(64,96,172,.10);
	  border:1px solid rgba(64,96,172,.18);
	  color:rgba(11,34,56,.92);
	  font-weight:900;
	  letter-spacing:.1px;
	  font-size:13px;
	}
	h1,h2,h3{ margin:0; }
	.title{
	  margin:12px 0 8px;
	  font-weight:900;
	  color:var(--navy);
	  letter-spacing:.1px;
	  line-height:1.15;
	  font-size: clamp(26px, 2.8vw, 40px);
	}
	.sub{
	  margin:0 auto;
	  max-width: 92ch;
	  color:var(--muted);
	  font-weight:700;
	  font-size:16px;
	  line-height:1.75;
	}

	/* HERO */
	.hero-visual{
	  padding:0;
	  position:relative;
	  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.08);
	  background:#0b2238;
	}
	.hero-slider{
	  position:relative;
	  height:70vh;
	  min-height:520px;
	  overflow:hidden;
	}
	.hero-slider picture{ display:contents; }
	.hero-slide{
	  position:absolute; inset:0;
	  width:100%; height:100%;
	  object-fit:cover;
	  opacity:0;
	  transition:opacity 1.1s ease-in-out;
	  transform:scale(1.01);
	  filter:saturate(1.03) contrast(1.02);
	}
	.hero-slide.active{ opacity:1; }
	.hero-grad{
	  position:absolute; inset:0;
	  background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(11,34,56,.05), rgba(11,34,56,.50));
	  pointer-events:none;
	}
	.hero-overlaytext{
	  position:absolute; left:0; right:0; bottom:22px;
	  color:#fff;
	}
	.hero-overlaytext .container{
	  display:flex; align-items:flex-end; justify-content:space-between; gap:18px;
	}
	.hero-overlaytext h1{
	  margin:0;
	  font-weight:900;
	  letter-spacing:.1px;
	  line-height:1.12;
	  font-size: clamp(24px, 3.1vw, 44px);
	}
	.hero-overlaytext p{
	  margin:8px 0 0;
	  max-width: 78ch;
	  color:rgba(255,255,255,.86);
	  font-weight:700;
	  line-height:1.7;
	}
	@media (max-width:900px){
	  .hero-overlaytext .container{ flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start; }
	}

	/* Band */
	.band{
	  padding:28px 0;
	  background:linear-gradient(90deg, var(--brand2), var(--brand));
	  color:#fff;
	}
	.band-inner{
	  display:flex;
	  align-items:center;
	  justify-content:space-between;
	  gap:16px;
	}
	.band h2{
	  margin:0;
	  font-weight:900;
	  font-size: clamp(18px, 2.2vw, 28px);
	  letter-spacing:.1px;
	}
	.band p{
	  margin:6px 0 0;
	  font-weight:700;
	  opacity:.92;
	}
	.band-actions{ display:flex; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center; }
	.band .btn{ background:#fff; color:var(--navy); box-shadow:none; }
	.band .btn:hover{ transform:translateY(-1px); }
	.band .btn.ghost{
	  background:rgba(255,255,255,.10);
	  color:#fff;
	  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.30);
	}
	@media (max-width:900px){
	  .band-inner{ flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start; }
	}

	/* Two-column layout */
	.grid-2{
	  display:grid;
	  grid-template-columns: 1.05fr .95fr;
	  gap:22px;
	  margin-top:28px;
	  align-items:start;
	}
	@media (max-width:900px){
	  .grid-2{ grid-template-columns:1fr; }
	}

	/* Panels */
	.panel{
	  background:#fff;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.08);
	  border-radius:var(--radius);
	  box-shadow:var(--shadow2);
	  padding:15px;
	}
	.panel.soft{
	  background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(64,96,172,.06), rgba(64,96,172,.00));
	}

	.lead-points{ margin-top:14px; display:grid; gap:10px; }
	.point{
	  display:flex; gap:12px; align-items:flex-start;
	  padding:12px 12px;
	  border-radius:14px;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.08);
	  background:rgba(15,23,42,.01);
	}
	.point i{ color:var(--brand); margin-top:3px; }
	.point b{ display:block; font-weight:900; }
	.point span{ display:block; margin-top:2px; color:var(--muted); font-weight:700; line-height:1.6; }

	/* Accordion */
	.faq{ display:grid; gap:12px; }
	details{
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.10);
	  border-radius:16px;
	  overflow:hidden;
	  background:#fff;
	  box-shadow:var(--shadow2);
	}
	summary{
	  list-style:none;
	  cursor:pointer;
	  padding:16px 16px;
	  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:12px;
	  font-weight:900;
	  color:var(--navy);
	}
	summary::-webkit-details-marker{ display:none; }
	.ans{
	  padding:0 16px 16px;
	  color:rgba(15,23,42,.86);
	  font-weight:700;
	  line-height:1.75;
	}
	.chev{
	  width:38px; height:38px;
	  border-radius:12px;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.10);
	  background:rgba(15,23,42,.03);
	  display:grid; place-items:center;
	  flex:0 0 auto;
	  transition:transform .15s ease;
	}
	details[open] .chev{ transform:rotate(180deg); }

	/* FEATURES CAROUSEL */
	.fcarousel{ margin-top:26px; }
	.ftrack{
	  display:flex;
	  gap:14px;
	  overflow-x:auto;
	  -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
	  padding:2px 2px 10px;
	  scrollbar-width:none;
	  -ms-overflow-style:none;
	  scroll-snap-type:none;
	  scroll-behavior:auto;
	  cursor:grab;
	  user-select:none;
	  -webkit-user-select:none;
	  touch-action: pan-x pan-y;
	}
	.ftrack::-webkit-scrollbar{ display:none; }
	.ftrack.dragging{ cursor:grabbing; }
	.ftrack.dragging *{ pointer-events:none; }

	.ftrack, .ftrack *{
	  -webkit-user-select:none;
	  user-select:none;
	}
	body.drag-no-select, body.drag-no-select *{
	  -webkit-user-select:none !important;
	  user-select:none !important;
	}

	.fslide{
	  flex:0 0 calc((100% - 28px) / 3);
	  background:#fff;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.08);
	  border-radius:18px;
	  padding:18px;
	  min-height:170px;
	}
	@media (max-width: 1024px){
	  .fslide{ flex-basis: calc((100% - 14px) / 2); }
	}
	@media (max-width: 700px){
	  .fslide{ flex-basis: 86vw; }
	}

	.f-top{ display:flex; gap:12px; align-items:center; margin-bottom:10px; }
	.f-icon{
	  width:44px; height:44px; border-radius:14px;
	  background:rgba(64,96,172,.12);
	  border:1px solid rgba(64,96,172,.18);
	  display:grid; place-items:center;
	  color:var(--brand2);
	  flex:0 0 auto;
	}
	.fslide h3{ font-weight:900; font-size:16px; color:var(--navy); margin:0; }
	.fslide p{ margin:6px 0 0; color:var(--muted); font-weight:700; line-height:1.7; }

	.dots{ display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:8px; margin-top:10px; }
	.dot{
	  width:10px; height:10px;
	  border-radius:999px;
	  border:0;
	  background:rgba(11,34,56,.18);
	  cursor:pointer;
	  padding:0;
	}
	.dot.active{ background:rgba(64,96,172,.95); }

	/* PROFILES */
	.profiles-grid{
	  margin-top:26px;
	  display:grid;
	  grid-template-columns:repeat(2, 1fr);
	  gap:18px;
	  align-items:stretch;
	}
	@media (max-width:900px){
	  .profiles-grid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; }
	}
	#products .prod-card{
	  background:#fff;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.10);
	  box-shadow:var(--shadow2);
	  border-radius:18px;
	  overflow:hidden;
	  display:flex;
	  flex-direction:column;
	  min-height:unset;
	  height:auto !important;
	  max-height:none !important;
	}
	#products .prod-media{
	  height:280px;
	  max-height:280px;
	  overflow:hidden;
	  padding:12px;
	  background:
		radial-gradient(circle at 20% 15%, rgba(64,96,172,.10), transparent 55%),
		linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(15,23,42,.015), rgba(15,23,42,.04));
	  display:flex;
	  align-items:center;
	  justify-content:center;
	  flex-shrink:0;
	}
	#products .prod-media img{
	  max-width:100%;
	  max-height:256px;
	  width:auto;
	  height:auto;
	  object-fit:contain;
	  object-position:center;
	  display:block;
	  flex-shrink:0;
	}
	@media (max-width:900px){
	  #products .prod-media{ height:240px; max-height:240px; }
	  #products .prod-media img{ max-height:216px; }
	}
	#products .prod-copy{
	  padding:18px;
	  display:flex !important;
	  flex-direction:column;
	  align-items:center;
	  justify-content:center;
	  text-align:center;
	  position:static !important;
	  opacity:1 !important;
	  visibility:visible !important;
	  transform:none !important;
	  background:#fff;
	  height:auto !important;
	  max-height:none !important;
	  min-height:120px !important;
	  overflow:visible !important;
	  font-size:16px !important;
	  line-height:1.65 !important;
	  flex:1 1 auto !important;
	}
	#products .prod-copy h3{
	  margin:0;
	  font-weight:900;
	  font-size:20px;
	  color:var(--navy);
	  display:block !important;
	  visibility:visible !important;
	  opacity:1 !important;
	  line-height:1.25 !important;
	}
	#products .prod-copy p{
	  margin:10px 0 0;
	  color:var(--muted);
	  font-weight:700;
	  line-height:1.8;
	  font-size:15px !important;
	  display:block !important;
	  visibility:visible !important;
	  opacity:1 !important;
	  max-height:none !important;
	  overflow:visible !important;
	}
	.mini-tags{ margin-top:14px; display:flex; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
	#products .prod-copy .mini-tags{
	  justify-content:center;
	  display:flex !important;
	  visibility:visible !important;
	  opacity:1 !important;
	}
	#products .prod-copy .tag{ display:inline-flex !important; }
	.tag{
	  display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
	  padding:8px 10px;
	  border-radius:999px;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.10);
	  background:rgba(15,23,42,.02);
	  font-weight:900;
	  font-size:12.5px;
	  color:rgba(15,23,42,.88);
	}
	.tag i{ color:var(--brand); }

	/* Shades carousel */
	.shade-carousel-wrap{
	  margin-top:26px;
	  position:relative;
	}
	.shade-track{
	  display:flex;
	  gap:16px;
	  overflow-x:auto;
	  scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
	  scroll-behavior:auto;
	  padding:4px 2px 8px;
	  scrollbar-width:none;
	  cursor:grab;
	  touch-action: pan-x pan-y;


	  overscroll-behavior-x:contain;
	  -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
	}
	.shade-track.dragging{
	  cursor:grabbing;
	  scroll-snap-type: none;
	}
	.shade-track::-webkit-scrollbar{ display:none; }
	.shade-slide{
	  flex:0 0 calc((100% - 48px) / 4);
	  min-width:0;
	  scroll-snap-align: start;
	}
	@media (max-width:1180px){
	  .shade-slide{ flex-basis:calc((100% - 32px) / 3); }
	}
	@media (max-width:900px){
	  .shade-slide{ flex-basis:calc((100% - 16px) / 2); }
	}
	@media (max-width:620px){
	  .shade-slide{ flex-basis:86%; }
	}
	.shade-card{
	  background:#fff;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.10);
	  border-radius:18px;
	  box-shadow:var(--shadow2);
	  overflow:hidden;
	}
	.shade-media{
	  aspect-ratio:1 / 1;
	  background:
		linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(15,23,42,.03), rgba(15,23,42,.06));
	  padding:10px;
	  display:grid;
	  place-items:center;
	}
	.shade-media img{
	  width:100%;
	  height:100%;
	  object-fit:contain;
	  object-position:center;
	  border-radius:12px;
	  background:#f7f7f7;
	}
	.shade-meta{
	  padding:12px 14px 14px;
	  text-align:center;
	}
	.shade-meta b{
	  display:block;
	  font-weight:900;
	  color:var(--navy);
	  letter-spacing:.1px;
	}
	.shade-meta span{
	  display:block;
	  margin-top:4px;
	  color:var(--muted);
	  font-weight:700;
	  font-size:12px;
	}
	.shade-nav{
	  position:absolute;
	  top:50%;
	  transform:translateY(-50%);
	  width:42px; height:42px;
	  border-radius:14px;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.12);
	  background:rgba(255,255,255,.96);
	  color:var(--navy);
	  box-shadow:var(--shadow2);
	  display:grid; place-items:center;
	  cursor:pointer;
	  z-index:2;
	}
	.shade-nav:hover{ background:#fff; }
	.shade-nav:disabled{
	  opacity:.45;
	  cursor:not-allowed;
	}
	.shade-nav.prev{ left:-10px; }
	.shade-nav.next{ right:-10px; }
	@media (max-width:900px){
	  .shade-nav{ display:none; }
	}
	.shade-dots{
	  display:flex;
	  justify-content:center;
	  gap:8px;
	  margin-top:12px;
	}
	.shade-dot{
	  width:10px;
	  height:10px;
	  border-radius:999px;
	  border:0;
	  background:rgba(11,34,56,.18);
	  padding:0;
	  cursor:pointer;
	}
	.shade-dot.active{ background:rgba(64,96,172,.95); }
	.shade-disclaimer{
	  margin-top:10px;
	  text-align:center;
	  color:rgba(11,34,56,.64);
	  font-weight:700;
	  font-size:12px;
	}

	/* Image cards + grids */
	.imgcard{
	  border-radius:18px;
	  overflow:hidden;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.10);
	  box-shadow:var(--shadow2);
	  background:#fff;
	}
	.imgcard img{
	  width:100%;
	  height:260px;
	  object-fit:cover;
	}
	/* composite-image card: background crops a quadrant/third instead of using <img> */
	.imgcard-bg{
	  height:260px;
	  background-repeat:no-repeat;
	  background-color:#dce4ef;
	}
	.imgcap{ padding:14px 14px 16px; }
	.imgcap b{ display:block; font-weight:900; color:var(--navy); }
	.imgcap span{ display:block; margin-top:4px; color:var(--muted); font-weight:700; line-height:1.65; }

	.imgcard.center .imgcap{ text-align:center; }
	.imgcard.center .imgcap span{
	  margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;
	  max-width: 48ch;
	}

	.grid-3{
	  display:grid;
	  grid-template-columns:repeat(3, 1fr);
	  gap:18px;
	  margin-top:26px;
	}
	@media (max-width:980px){ .grid-3{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } }

	.grid-4{
	  display:grid;
	  grid-template-columns:repeat(4, 1fr);
	  gap:18px;
	  margin-top:26px;
	}
	@media (max-width:1100px){ .grid-4{ grid-template-columns:repeat(2, 1fr);} }
	@media (max-width:640px){ .grid-4{ grid-template-columns:1fr;} }

	/* Specs tiles */
	.specgrid{
	  margin-top:26px;
	  display:grid;
	  grid-template-columns:repeat(3, 1fr);
	  gap:14px;
	}
	@media (max-width:980px){ .specgrid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } }
	.spec{
	  background:#fff;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.08);
	  border-radius:18px;
	  box-shadow:var(--shadow2);
	  padding:16px 16px;
	}
	.spec small{
	  display:block;
	  font-weight:900;
	  letter-spacing:.1px;
	  color:rgba(11,34,56,.70);
	  text-transform:uppercase;
	  font-size:11px;
	}
	.spec b{
	  display:block;
	  margin-top:6px;
	  font-size:16px;
	  font-weight:900;
	  color:var(--navy);
	}
	.spec span{
	  display:block;
	  margin-top:6px;
	  color:var(--muted);
	  font-weight:700;
	  line-height:1.65;
	}

	/* Gallery */
	.gallery{
	  margin-top:26px;
	  display:grid;
	  grid-template-columns:repeat(12, 1fr);
	  gap:12px;
	}
	.g{
	  grid-column:span 4;
	  border-radius:18px;
	  overflow:hidden;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.10);
	  box-shadow:var(--shadow2);
	  background:#fff;
	  cursor:pointer;
	  transition:transform .12s ease, box-shadow .18s ease;
	}
	.g:hover{
	  transform:translateY(-2px);
	  box-shadow:0 18px 55px rgba(2,6,23,.14);
	}
	.g img{ width:100%; height:220px; object-fit:cover; }
	.g .cap{
	  padding:12px 12px 14px;
	  font-weight:900;
	  color:var(--navy);
	  font-size:13.5px;
	}
	.g.span6{ grid-column:span 6; }
	.g.span3{ grid-column:span 3; }

	@media (max-width:900px){
	  .gallery{ grid-template-columns:repeat(6, 1fr); }
	  .g,.g.span6,.g.span3{ grid-column:span 6; }
	}

	/* Stats grid */
	.stats-grid{
	  margin-top:26px;
	  display:grid;
	  grid-template-columns:repeat(4, 1fr);
	  gap:14px;
	}
	@media (max-width:900px){ .stats-grid{ grid-template-columns:repeat(2, 1fr); } }
	.stat-card{
	  background:#fff;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.08);
	  border-radius:18px;
	  box-shadow:var(--shadow2);
	  padding:20px 16px;
	  text-align:center;
	}
	.stat-card .num{
	  display:block;
	  font-size:32px;
	  font-weight:900;
	  color:var(--brand);
	  letter-spacing:-.5px;
	}
	.stat-card .label{
	  display:block;
	  margin-top:4px;
	  font-weight:800;
	  color:var(--muted);
	  font-size:14px;
	}

	/* Video cards */
	.vgrid{
	  margin-top:18px;
	  display:grid;
	  grid-template-columns:repeat(3, 1fr);
	  gap:18px;
	}
	@media (max-width:980px){ .vgrid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } }
	.vcard{
	  border-radius:18px;
	  overflow:hidden;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.10);
	  box-shadow:var(--shadow2);
	  background:#fff;
	  cursor:pointer;
	  transition:transform .12s ease, box-shadow .18s ease;
	}
	.vcard:hover{
	  transform:translateY(-2px);
	  box-shadow:0 18px 55px rgba(2,6,23,.14);
	}
	.vthumb{
	  position:relative;
	  height:220px;
	  background:#000;
	}
	.vthumb img{ width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; opacity:.95; }
	.playbtn{
	  position:absolute; inset:0;
	  display:grid; place-items:center;
	  background:linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,0,0,.25));
	}
	.playbtn .circle{
	  width:60px; height:60px;
	  border-radius:50%;
	  background:rgba(0,0,0,.55);
	  border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.85);
	  display:grid; place-items:center;
	  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
	}
	.playbtn svg{ width:30px; height:30px; fill:#fff; margin-left:2px; }
	.vmeta{ padding:12px 12px 14px; }
	.vmeta b{ display:block; font-weight:900; color:var(--navy); }
	.vmeta span{ display:block; margin-top:4px; color:var(--muted); font-weight:700; line-height:1.65; }

	/* CTA band section */
	.cta{
	  background:var(--soft);
	  border-top:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.08);
	  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.08);
	}
	.cta-inner{
	  display:grid;
	  grid-template-columns: 1.05fr .95fr;
	  gap:18px;
	  align-items:center;
	}
	@media (max-width:980px){ .cta-inner{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } }

	/* MODAL (Quote) */
	.modal-overlay{
	  display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:300;
	  background:rgba(2,6,23,.62);
	  backdrop-filter: blur(7px);
	  justify-content:center; align-items:flex-start;
	  padding:18px 10px;
	}
	.modal-overlay.show{ display:flex; }
	.modal{
	  width:min(560px, 96vw);
	  background:#fff;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.10);
	  border-radius:22px;
	  box-shadow:0 30px 90px rgba(2,6,23,.35);
	  overflow:hidden;
	  position:relative;
	}
	.mclose{
	  position:absolute; top:12px; right:12px;
	  width:44px; height:44px;
	  border-radius:14px;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.12);
	  background:#fff;
	  cursor:pointer;
	  display:grid; place-items:center;
	  z-index:5;
	}
	.mhead{
	  padding:22px 18px 12px;
	  text-align:center;
	  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.08);
	  background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(64,96,172,.10), rgba(64,96,172,.00));
	}
	.mhead h3{
	  margin:0;
	  font-weight:900;
	  color:var(--navy);
	  letter-spacing:.1px;
	}
	.mhead p{
	  margin:8px auto 0;
	  max-width: 74ch;
	  color:var(--muted);
	  font-weight:700;
	  line-height:1.7;
	  font-size: 14px;
	}
	.mbody{ padding:16px 14px 18px; }

	[data-smartform] h1,
	[data-smartform] h2,
	[data-smartform] h3{
	  display:none !important;
	}

	/* PREMIUM VIEWER */
	.viewer{
	  position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:320;
	  background:rgba(2,6,23,.82);
	  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
	  display:none;
	  align-items:center;
	  justify-content:center;
	  padding:18px;
	  overflow:hidden;
	}
	.viewer.show{ display:flex; }

	.viewer-stage{
	  width:min(1200px, 96vw);
	  max-height:90vh;
	  display:flex;
	  align-items:center;
	  justify-content:center;
	  position:relative;
	  overflow:hidden;
	}

	.viewer-stage img{
	  width:100%;
	  max-height:85vh;
	  object-fit:contain;
	  border-radius:16px;
	  background:transparent;
	  box-shadow:0 28px 90px rgba(0,0,0,.45);
	  display:block;
	}

	.viewer-stage video{
	  width:100%;
	  max-height:85vh;
	  border-radius:16px;
	  background:#000;
	  box-shadow:0 28px 90px rgba(0,0,0,.45);
	  display:block;
	  object-fit:contain;
	}

	.viewer-stage iframe{
	  width:100%;
	  aspect-ratio:16/9;
	  max-height:85vh;
	  border:none;
	  border-radius:16px;
	  background:#000;
	  box-shadow:0 28px 90px rgba(0,0,0,.45);
	  display:block;
	}

	.viewer-close{
	  position:fixed;
	  top:18px; right:18px;
	  width:52px; height:52px;
	  border-radius:16px;
	  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);
	  background:rgba(255,255,255,.10);
	  color:#fff;
	  cursor:pointer;
	  display:grid; place-items:center;
	  z-index:5;
	  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
	  box-shadow:0 18px 55px rgba(0,0,0,.35);
	  transition:transform .12s ease, background .12s ease;
	}
	.viewer-close:hover{ transform:translateY(-1px); background:rgba(255,255,255,.14); }

	.viewer-nav{
	  position:fixed;
	  top:50%;
	  transform:translateY(-50%);
	  width:56px; height:56px;
	  border-radius:18px;
	  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);
	  background:rgba(255,255,255,.10);
	  color:#fff;
	  cursor:pointer;
	  display:grid; place-items:center;
	  z-index:5;
	  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
	  box-shadow:0 18px 55px rgba(0,0,0,.28);
	  transition:transform .12s ease, background .12s ease;
	}
	.viewer-nav:hover{ transform:translateY(-50%) scale(1.03); background:rgba(255,255,255,.14); }
	.viewer-nav.prev{ left:16px; }
	.viewer-nav.next{ right:16px; }

	.viewer-caption{
    display:none;
	  position:fixed;
	  bottom:18px;
	  max-width:min(980px, 92vw);
	  padding:10px 14px;
	  border-radius:999px;
	  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);
	  background:rgba(255,255,255,.10);
	  color:rgba(255,255,255,.92);
	  font-weight:900;
	  letter-spacing:.1px;
	  text-align:center;
	  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
	  box-shadow:0 18px 55px rgba(0,0,0,.28);
	}
	.viewer-caption:empty{ display:none; }

	@media (max-width:900px){
	  .viewer{ padding:10px; }
	  .viewer-stage{ width:min(1200px, calc(100vw - 20px)); }
	  .viewer-stage video{ max-height:75vh; }
	  .viewer-stage iframe{ max-height:75vh; }
	  .viewer-stage img{ max-height:80vh; }
	  .viewer-nav{ width:44px; height:44px; border-radius:14px; }
	  .viewer-nav.prev{ left:6px; }
	  .viewer-nav.next{ right:6px; }
	  .viewer-close{ top:10px; right:10px; width:44px; height:44px; border-radius:14px; }
	  .viewer-caption{ bottom:10px; font-size:13px; padding:8px 12px; }
	}

	/* FLOATING ACTION WIDGET */
	.fab{
	  position:fixed;
	  right:18px;
	  bottom:18px;
	  z-index:220;
	  display:flex;
	  flex-direction:column;
	  align-items:flex-end;
	  gap:10px;
	}
	.fab-actions{
	  display:flex;
	  flex-direction:column;
	  gap:10px;
	  opacity:0;
	  transform:translateY(8px);
	  pointer-events:none;
	  transition:opacity .18s ease, transform .18s ease;
	}
	.fab.open .fab-actions{
	  opacity:1;
	  transform:translateY(0);
	  pointer-events:auto;
	}
	i#fabIcon { color:#fff; }

	.fab-main{
	  width:54px;
	  height:54px;
	  border-radius:16px;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.12);
	  background:var(--brand);
	  box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(2,6,23,.10);
	  cursor:pointer;
	  display:grid;
	  place-items:center;
	  font-size:20px;
	}

	.fab-action{
	  display:flex;
	  align-items:center;
	  gap:10px;
	  padding:12px 14px;
	  border-radius:999px;
	  border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,.10);
	  background:#fff;
	  box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(2,6,23,.08);
	  cursor:pointer;
	  font-weight:900;
	  white-space:nowrap;
	  font-family:var(--font);
	}
	.fab-action span{ font-size:13.5px; }

	/* Mobile Bottom Bar */
	.mobile-bar{
	  display:none;
	  position:fixed;
	  left:0; right:0; bottom:0;
	  z-index:230;
	  background:rgba(11,34,56,.94);
	  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
	  border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);
	  box-shadow:0 -10px 30px rgba(2,6,23,.25);
	  padding:6px 8px;
	  padding-bottom: calc(8px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
	}
	.mbar-btn{
	  flex:1;
	  color:#fff;
	  font-weight:900;
	  font-size:13px;
	  padding:6px 8px;
	  display:flex;
	  gap:8px;
	  align-items:center;
	  justify-content:center;
	  background:transparent;
	  border:0;
	  cursor:pointer;
	  border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
	  font-family:var(--font);
	}
	.mbar-btn:last-child{ border-right:0; }
	.mbar-btn i{ font-size:16px; }

	body.is-mobile-actions .fab{ display:none !important; }
	body.is-mobile-actions .mobile-bar{ display:flex !important; }
	body.is-mobile-actions{ padding-bottom: calc(86px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); }

	body:not(.is-mobile-actions) .mobile-bar{ display:none !important; }
	body:not(.is-mobile-actions) .fab{ display:flex; }
	body:not(.is-mobile-actions){ padding-bottom: 0; }

	/* Side brochure tab */
	.side-brochure{
	  position:fixed;
	  right:-52px;
	  top:50%;

/* 1) Button: darken on hover/press (no movement) */

}

}

/* Message area: show a compact, centered chip only when there’s text */

		  <b>Prominance Uniframe</b> specializes in designing and manufacturing high-quality aluminium windows and doors that combine

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     UNIFRAME FEATURE VIDEOS SLIDER
     Fully self-contained — fvs namespace, zero conflicts
     Revised: Bunny poster images + mobile overlay arrows + lightweight stop logic
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<style>
/* ── Feature Video Slider (fvs) ──────────────────────────── */
.fvs-shell{padding:0 0 10px;}
.fvs-eye{
  text-align:center;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:#4060AC;margin:0 0 14px;
}
.fvs-row{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
  max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 20px;
  box-sizing:border-box;
}
.fvs-arrow{
 flex:0 0 52px;width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;
  border:3px solid #4060AC;background:#fff;color:#4060AC;
  cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  transition:background .2s,color .2s,border-color .2s,opacity .2s;
  outline:none;
  -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;
}
.fvs-arrow:hover,.fvs-arrow:focus-visible{background:#4060AC;color:#fff;}
.fvs-arrow svg{width:20px;height:20px;pointer-events:none;}
.fvs-vp{flex:1 1 0;overflow:hidden;min-width:0;}
.fvs-track{display:flex;gap:16px;will-change:transform;touch-action:pan-y; cursor:default;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;
}
.fvs-card{
  flex:0 0 auto;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;
  background:#fff;box-shadow:0 2px 18px rgba(11,34,56,.1);
}
/* 16:9 via padding trick — works on all browsers/iOS */
.fvs-vw{position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:#0c1e30;}
.fvs-vw::before{content:'';display:block;padding-top:56.25%;}
.fvs-vw video{
  position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;
  object-fit:contain;display:block;
  background:#0c1e30;
}
/* Play overlay */
.fvs-ov{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  background:rgba(11,30,50,.28);cursor:pointer;
  transition:opacity .22s;
}
.fvs-ov.off{opacity:0;pointer-events:none;}
.fvs-pb{
  width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(64,96,172,.9);border:none;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  pointer-events:none;transition:transform .2s,background .2s;
}
.fvs-ov:hover .fvs-pb{transform:scale(1.1);background:#4060AC;}
.fvs-pb svg{width:18px;height:18px;fill:#fff;margin-left:3px;}
/* Bottom-right controls */
.fvs-cbar{
  position:absolute;bottom:8px;right:8px;
  display:flex;gap:5px;
  opacity:0;transition:opacity .18s;pointer-events:none;
}
.fvs-vw:hover .fvs-cbar,
.fvs-vw.fvs-on .fvs-cbar{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;}
.fvs-cb{
  width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:5px;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.65);border:none;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  transition:background .15s;
}
.fvs-cb:hover{background:rgba(64,96,172,.9);}
.fvs-cb svg{width:12px;height:12px;display:block;pointer-events:none;}
/* Caption */
.fvs-cap{
  padding:8px 12px;font-size:.76rem;font-weight:600;
  color:#0b2238;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;
}

/* Mobile: show arrows beautifully OVER video, keep viewport full width */
@media (max-width:599px){
  .fvs-row{
    position:relative;
    padding:0 12px;
    gap:0; /* no width loss on mobile */
  }

  .fvs-vp{
    flex:1 1 100%;
    min-width:0;
  }

  .fvs-arrow{
    display:flex;
    position:absolute;
    z-index:5;
    top:50%;
    transform:translateY(calc(-50% - 18px)); /* shift up to center over video (not caption) */
    width:38px;
    height:38px;
    flex:0 0 38px;
    border-radius:999px;
    border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.9);
    background:rgba(11,34,56,.55);
    color:#fff;
    box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.25);
    backdrop-filter:blur(4px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(4px);
  }

  .fvs-arrow:hover,
  .fvs-arrow:focus-visible{
    background:rgba(64,96,172,.92);
    color:#fff;
    border-color:#fff;
  }

  .fvs-arrow svg{width:14px;height:14px;}
  #fvsPrev{left:18px;}
  #fvsNext{right:18px;}
}

  vid.setAttribute('webkit-playsinline','');
  vid.setAttribute('preload','none');
  vid.setAttribute('loop','');
  vid.setAttribute('poster', CDN + d.f.replace(/\.mp4$/i, '.jpg'));
  vid.muted = false; // muted start = browser-safe play
  var srcEl = document.createElement('source');
  srcEl.setAttribute('data-src', d.src || CDN + d.f);
  srcEl.type = 'video/mp4';
  vid.appendChild(srcEl);

  var ov = document.createElement('div');
  ov.className = 'fvs-ov';
  ov.setAttribute('role','button');
  ov.setAttribute('tabindex','0');
  ov.setAttribute('aria-label','Play ' + d.cap);
  ov.innerHTML = '<div class="fvs-pb">' + ICO.play + '</div>';

  var cbar = document.createElement('div');
  cbar.className = 'fvs-cbar';

  var ppBtn = document.createElement('button');
  ppBtn.className = 'fvs-cb';
  ppBtn.type = 'button';
  ppBtn.setAttribute('aria-label','Pause');
  ppBtn.innerHTML = ICO.pause;

  var mtBtn = document.createElement('button');
  mtBtn.className = 'fvs-cb';
  mtBtn.type = 'button';
  mtBtn.setAttribute('aria-label','Unmute');
  mtBtn.innerHTML = ICO.muted;

  cbar.appendChild(ppBtn);
  cbar.appendChild(mtBtn);
  vw.appendChild(vid);
  vw.appendChild(ov);
  vw.appendChild(cbar);

  var cap = document.createElement('p');
  cap.className = 'fvs-cap';
  cap.textContent = d.cap;

  card.appendChild(vw);
  card.appendChild(cap);

  /* ── behaviour ── */
  var loaded = false;

  function load(){
    if(!loaded){
      srcEl.src = srcEl.getAttribute('data-src');
      vid.load();
      loaded = true;
    }
  }
  function syncPP(){
    ppBtn.innerHTML = vid.paused ? ICO.play : ICO.pause;
    ppBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', vid.paused ? 'Play' : 'Pause');
  }
  function syncMt(){
    mtBtn.innerHTML = vid.muted ? ICO.muted : ICO.sound;
    mtBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', vid.muted ? 'Unmute' : 'Mute');
  }
  function doPlay(){
    stopAll(card); // only one video plays at a time
    load();
    vid.play().then(function(){
      ov.classList.add('off');
      vw.classList.add('fvs-on');
      syncPP();
    }).catch(function(){});
  }
  function doPause(){
    vid.pause();
    ov.classList.remove('off');
    vw.classList.remove('fvs-on');
    syncPP();
  }

  /* called by carousel on navigate / visibility changes */
  card.fvsStop = function(){
    vid.pause();
    try{ vid.currentTime = 0; }catch(_){}
    ov.classList.remove('off');
    vw.classList.remove('fvs-on');
    syncPP();
  };

  ov.addEventListener('click', doPlay);
  ov.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){
    if(e.key==='Enter' || e.key===' '){
      e.preventDefault();
      doPlay();
    }
  });
  ppBtn.addEventListener('click', function(e){
    e.stopPropagation();
    vid.paused ? doPlay() : doPause();
  });
  mtBtn.addEventListener('click', function(e){
    e.stopPropagation();
    vid.muted = !vid.muted;
    syncMt();
  });
  vid.addEventListener('click', function(e){
	e.stopPropagation();
	if (vid.paused) doPlay();
	else doPause();
  });

  syncPP();
  syncMt();
  return card;
}

/* ── populate: [clone_last3 · real_7 · clone_first3] ── */
var pool = DATA.slice(-CL).concat(DATA, DATA.slice(0,CL));
var cards = pool.map(function(d){ return makeCard(d); });
cards.forEach(function(c){ track.appendChild(c); });

/* ── layout ── */
function calcCW(){
  var n = ipv();
  cw = (vp.offsetWidth - GAP*(n-1)) / n;
  cards.forEach(function(c){ c.style.width = cw + 'px'; });
}

function applyPos(anim){
  track.style.transition = anim ? 'transform .44s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)' : 'none';
  if(!anim) track.getBoundingClientRect(); // flush
  track.style.transform = 'translateX(' + ( -pos*(cw+GAP) ) + 'px)';
}

/* ── navigation ── */
function stopAll(except){
  cards.forEach(function(c){
    if(c !== except && c.fvsStop) c.fvsStop();
  });
}

function go(d){
  if(busy) return;
  stopAll();
  busy = true;
  pos += d;
  applyPos(true);
}

track.addEventListener('transitionend', function(){
  busy = false;
  /* infinite wrap — instant jump to real position */
  if(pos >= CL + N){ pos -= N; applyPos(false); }
  if(pos <  CL)    { pos += N; applyPos(false); }
});

btnP.addEventListener('click', function(){ go(-1); });
btnN.addEventListener('click', function(){ go(+1); });

  swipe = false;
},{passive:true});*/

/* ── swipe: touch + desktop drag (safe) ── */
var tx=0, ty=0, swipe=false;
var md=false, mx=0, my=0, blockClick=false;

/* touch (keeps mobile vertical scroll behavior) */
track.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e){
  if(!e.touches || !e.touches[0]) return;
  tx = e.touches[0].clientX;
  ty = e.touches[0].clientY;
  swipe = true;
},{passive:true});

track.addEventListener('touchmove', function(e){
  if(!swipe || !e.touches || !e.touches[0]) return;
  if(Math.abs(e.touches[0].clientY - ty) > Math.abs(e.touches[0].clientX - tx)) swipe = false;
},{passive:true});

track.addEventListener('touchend', function(e){
  if(!swipe || !e.changedTouches || !e.changedTouches[0]) return;
  var dx = e.changedTouches[0].clientX - tx;
  if(Math.abs(dx) > 40) go(dx < 0 ? 1 : -1);
  swipe = false;
},{passive:true});

/* ── resize ── */
var rt;
window.addEventListener('resize', function(){
  clearTimeout(rt);
  rt = setTimeout(function(){
    calcCW();
    applyPos(false);
  }, 120);
});

/* ── stop hidden playback (lightweight) ── */
document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', function(){
  if(document.hidden) stopAll();
});
window.addEventListener('pagehide', function(){ stopAll(); });

/* stop videos when slider leaves viewport */
if('IntersectionObserver' in window){
  var shell = (vp.closest && vp.closest('.fvs-shell')) || null;
  if(!shell){
    var n = vp;
    while(n && n.nodeType === 1){
      if(n.classList && n.classList.contains('fvs-shell')){ shell = n; break; }
      n = n.parentNode;
    }
  }
  if(shell){
    var io = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
      var ent = entries && entries[0];
      if(!ent) return;
      if(!ent.isIntersecting) stopAll();
    }, { threshold: 0.08 });
    io.observe(shell);
  }
}

/* ── init ── */
requestAnimationFrame(function(){
  calcCW();
  applyPos(false);
});

})();
</script>

<!-- INFLUENCER VERTICAL VIDEOS SLIDER (ivs) -->
<style>
.ivs-shell { padding: 0 0 10px; }
.ivs-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 20px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
.ivs-arrow {
   flex: 0 0 52px;
  width: 52px;
  height: 52px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 3px solid #4060ac;
  background: #fff;
  color: #4060ac;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  transition: background .2s, color .2s, border-color .2s, opacity .2s;
  outline: none;
  -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
}
.ivs-arrow:hover,
.ivs-arrow:focus-visible { background: #4060ac; color: #fff; }
.ivs-arrow svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; pointer-events: none; }

.ivs-vp { flex: 1 1 0; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0; }
.ivs-track {
  display: flex;
  gap: 14px;
  will-change: transform;
  touch-action: pan-y;
  cursor: default;
  user-select: none;
  -webkit-user-select: none;
}
.ivs-track.ivs-dragging { cursor: grabbing; }

.ivs-card {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  border-radius: 14px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 18px rgba(11,34,56,.1);
}
.ivs-vw { position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: #0c1e30; }
.ivs-vw::before { content: ''; display: block; padding-top: 177.7778%; } /* 9:16 */
.ivs-vw video {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: contain;
  display: block;
  background: #0c1e30;
}

/* play overlay */
.ivs-ov {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  background: rgba(11,30,50,.28);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: opacity .22s;
}
.ivs-ov.off { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; }
.ivs-pb {
  width: 54px;
  height: 54px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(64,96,172,.9);
  border: none;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  pointer-events: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: transform .2s, background .2s;
}
.ivs-ov:hover .ivs-pb { transform: scale(1.1); background: #4060ac; }
.ivs-pb svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; fill: #fff; margin-left: 3px; }

/* controls */
.ivs-cbar {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 8px;
  right: 8px;
  display: flex;
  gap: 5px;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity .18s;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.ivs-vw:hover .ivs-cbar,
.ivs-vw.ivs-on .ivs-cbar { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; }
.ivs-cb {
  width: 28px;
  height: 28px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,.65);
  border: none;
  color: #fff;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  transition: background .15s;
}
.ivs-cb:hover { background: rgba(64,96,172,.9); }
.ivs-cb svg { width: 12px; height: 12px; display: block; pointer-events: none; }

.ivs-cap {
  padding: 8px 10px;
  font-size: .86rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #0b2238;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  text-align: center;
}

/* mobile arrows overlay */
@media (max-width: 599px) {
  .ivs-row { position: relative; padding: 0 12px; gap: 0; }
  .ivs-vp { flex: 1 1 100%; min-width: 0; }
  .ivs-arrow {
    display: flex;
    position: absolute;
    z-index: 5;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(calc(-50% - 32px));
    width: 38px;
    height: 38px;
    flex: 0 0 38px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.9);
    background: rgba(11,34,56,.55);
    color: #fff;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.25);
    backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  }
  .ivs-arrow:hover,
  .ivs-arrow:focus-visible {
    background: rgba(64,96,172,.92);
    color: #fff;
    border-color: #fff;
  }
  .ivs-arrow svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; }
  .ivs-prev { left: 18px; }
  .ivs-next { right: 18px; }
}

@media (min-width:600px){
  .fvs-row,
  .ivs-row{
	position:relative;
	gap:0;
	padding:0 12px;
  }

  .fvs-vp,
  .ivs-vp{
	flex:1 1 100%;
	min-width:0;
  }

  .fvs-arrow,
  .ivs-arrow{
	position:absolute;
	z-index:5;
	top:50%;
  }

  .fvs-arrow{ transform:translateY(calc(-50% - 18px)); }
  .ivs-arrow{ transform:translateY(calc(-50% - 32px)); }

  #fvsPrev, .ivs-prev{ left:18px; }
  #fvsNext, .ivs-next{ right:18px; }
}
 .ivs-pb { pointer-events: none; }

</style>

<script>
(function () {
  "use strict";

  var DATA = [
    {
      v: "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/videos/expo-zak.mp4",
      p: "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/videos/posters/poster-expo-zak.jpg",
      cap: "Expo Walkthrough - Zak"
    },
    {
      v: "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/videos/expo-architect-shalinth.mp4",
      p: "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/videos/posters/poster-expo-architect-shalinth.jpg",
      cap: "Professional Review - Architect Shalinth"
    },
    {
      v: "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/videos/expo-ridhi-khosla.mp4",
      p: "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/videos/posters/poster-expo-ridhi-khosla.jpg",
      cap: "Interior Design Perspective - Ridhi Khosla"
    },
    {
      v: "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/videos/expo-salmansurfs.mp4",
      p: "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/videos/posters/poster-expo-salmansurfs.jpg",
      cap: "Expo Walkthrough - Salman Surfs"
    }
  ];

  var ICO = {
    play:  '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#fff"><polygon points="5,3 19,12 5,21"/></svg>',
    pause: '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#fff"><rect x="6" y="4" width="4" height="16"/><rect x="14" y="4" width="4" height="16"/></svg>',
    sound: '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="11,5 6,9 2,9 2,15 6,15 11,19 11,5"/><path d="M19.07 4.93a10 10 0 0 1 0 14.14"/><path d="M15.54 8.46a5 5 0 0 1 0 7.07"/></svg>',
    muted: '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="11,5 6,9 2,9 2,15 6,15 11,19 11,5"/><line x1="23" y1="9" x2="17" y2="15"/><line x1="17" y1="9" x2="23" y2="15"/></svg>'
  };

  function ipv() {
    return window.innerWidth >= 900 ? 3 : (window.innerWidth >= 600 ? 2 : 1);
  }

  function init(root) {
    var vp = root.querySelector(".ivs-vp");
    var track = root.querySelector(".ivs-track");
    var btnP = root.querySelector(".ivs-prev");
    var btnN = root.querySelector(".ivs-next");
    if (!vp || !track || !btnP || !btnN) return;

    var GAP = 14;
    var CL = 4;
    var N = DATA.length;
    var pos = CL;
    var busy = false;
    var cw = 0;

    function makeCard(d) {
      var card = document.createElement("div");
      card.className = "ivs-card";

      var vw = document.createElement("div");
      vw.className = "ivs-vw";

      var vid = document.createElement("video");
      vid.setAttribute("playsinline", "");
      vid.setAttribute("webkit-playsinline", "");
      vid.setAttribute("preload", "none");
      vid.setAttribute("loop", "");
      vid.setAttribute("poster", d.p);
      vid.muted = false;

      var srcEl = document.createElement("source");
      srcEl.type = "video/mp4";
      srcEl.setAttribute("data-src", d.v);
      vid.appendChild(srcEl);

      var ov = document.createElement("div");
      ov.className = "ivs-ov";
      ov.setAttribute("role", "button");
      ov.setAttribute("tabindex", "0");
      ov.setAttribute("aria-label", "Play " + d.cap);
      ov.innerHTML = '<div class="ivs-pb">' + ICO.play + "</div>";

      var cbar = document.createElement("div");
      cbar.className = "ivs-cbar";

      var ppBtn = document.createElement("button");
      ppBtn.className = "ivs-cb";
      ppBtn.type = "button";
      ppBtn.setAttribute("aria-label", "Pause");
      ppBtn.innerHTML = ICO.pause;

      var mtBtn = document.createElement("button");
      mtBtn.className = "ivs-cb";
      mtBtn.type = "button";
      mtBtn.setAttribute("aria-label", "Unmute");
      mtBtn.innerHTML = ICO.muted;

      cbar.appendChild(ppBtn);
      cbar.appendChild(mtBtn);

      vw.appendChild(vid);
      vw.appendChild(ov);
      vw.appendChild(cbar);

      var cap = document.createElement("p");
      cap.className = "ivs-cap";
      cap.textContent = d.cap;

      card.appendChild(vw);
      card.appendChild(cap);

      var loaded = false;
      function load() {
        if (loaded) return;
        srcEl.src = srcEl.getAttribute("data-src");
        vid.load();
        loaded = true;
      }
      function syncPP() {
        ppBtn.innerHTML = vid.paused ? ICO.play : ICO.pause;
        ppBtn.setAttribute("aria-label", vid.paused ? "Play" : "Pause");
      }
      function syncMt() {
        mtBtn.innerHTML = vid.muted ? ICO.muted : ICO.sound;
        mtBtn.setAttribute("aria-label", vid.muted ? "Unmute" : "Mute");
      }
      function doPlay() {
        stopAll(card);
        load();
        vid.play().then(function () {
          ov.classList.add("off");
          vw.classList.add("ivs-on");
          syncPP();
        }).catch(function () {});
      }
      function doPause() {
        vid.pause();
        ov.classList.remove("off");
        vw.classList.remove("ivs-on");
        syncPP();
      }

      card.ivsStop = function () {
        vid.pause();
        try { vid.currentTime = 0; } catch (_) {}
        ov.classList.remove("off");
        vw.classList.remove("ivs-on");
        syncPP();
      };

      ov.addEventListener("click", doPlay);
      ov.addEventListener("keydown", function (e) {
        if (e.key === "Enter" || e.key === " ") {
          e.preventDefault();
          doPlay();
        }
      });
      ppBtn.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
        e.stopPropagation();
        vid.paused ? doPlay() : doPause();
      });
      mtBtn.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
        e.stopPropagation();
        vid.muted = !vid.muted;
        syncMt();
      });
	  vid.addEventListener('click', function(e){
		e.stopPropagation();
		if (vid.paused) doPlay();
		else doPause();
	  });

      syncPP();
      syncMt();
      return card;
    }

    var pool = DATA.slice(-CL).concat(DATA, DATA.slice(0, CL));
    var cards = pool.map(function (d) { return makeCard(d); });
    cards.forEach(function (c) { track.appendChild(c); });

    function calcCW() {
      var n = ipv();
      cw = (vp.offsetWidth - GAP * (n - 1)) / n;
      cards.forEach(function (c) { c.style.width = cw + "px"; });
    }

    function applyPos(anim) {
      track.style.transition = anim ? "transform .44s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)" : "none";
      if (!anim) track.getBoundingClientRect();
      track.style.transform = "translateX(" + (-pos * (cw + GAP)) + "px)";
    }

    function stopAll(except) {
      cards.forEach(function (c) {
        if (c !== except && c.ivsStop) c.ivsStop();
      });
    }

    function go(d) {
      if (busy) return;
      stopAll();
      busy = true;
      pos += d;
      applyPos(true);
    }

    track.addEventListener("transitionend", function () {
      busy = false;
      if (pos >= CL + N) { pos -= N; applyPos(false); }
      if (pos < CL)      { pos += N; applyPos(false); }
    });

    btnP.addEventListener("click", function () { go(-1); });
    btnN.addEventListener("click", function () { go(1); });

    /* touch swipe */
    var tx = 0, ty = 0, swipe = false;
    track.addEventListener("touchstart", function (e) {
      if (!e.touches || !e.touches[0]) return;
      tx = e.touches[0].clientX;
      ty = e.touches[0].clientY;
      swipe = true;
    }, { passive: true });

    track.addEventListener("touchmove", function (e) {
      if (!swipe || !e.touches || !e.touches[0]) return;
      if (Math.abs(e.touches[0].clientY - ty) > Math.abs(e.touches[0].clientX - tx)) swipe = false;
    }, { passive: true });

    track.addEventListener("touchend", function (e) {
      if (!swipe || !e.changedTouches || !e.changedTouches[0]) return;
      var dx = e.changedTouches[0].clientX - tx;
      if (Math.abs(dx) > 40) go(dx < 0 ? 1 : -1);
      swipe = false;
    }, { passive: true });

    /* desktop drag swipe */

//

    var rt;
    window.addEventListener("resize", function () {
      clearTimeout(rt);
      rt = setTimeout(function () {
        calcCW();
        applyPos(false);
      }, 120);
    });

    document.addEventListener("visibilitychange", function () {
      if (document.hidden) stopAll();
    });
    window.addEventListener("pagehide", function () { stopAll(); });

    if ("IntersectionObserver" in window) {
      var io = new IntersectionObserver(function (entries) {
        var ent = entries && entries[0];
        if (ent && !ent.isIntersecting) stopAll();
      }, { threshold: 0.08 });
      io.observe(root);
    }

    requestAnimationFrame(function () {
      calcCW();
      applyPos(false);
    });
  }

  document.querySelectorAll("[data-ivs]").forEach(init);
})();

	}
  </style>

  <script>
  (function(){
	const images = [
	  "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/renders/render-ext-01.jpg",
	  "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/renders/render-ext-02.jpg",
	  "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/renders/render-villa-ext.jpg",
	  "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/renders/render-graf45-01.jpg",
	  "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/renders/render-graf45-02.jpg",
	  "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/renders/render-graf32-01.jpg",
	  "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/renders/render-graf32-02.jpg",
	  "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/renders/render-graf32-03.jpg",
	  "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/renders/render-graf26-01.jpg",
	  "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/renders/render-fold-slide.jpg",
	  "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/renders/render-georgian.jpg",
	  "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/renders/render-interior-01.jpg",
	  "https://lpimages.b-cdn.net/uniframe/assets_aluminium/renders/render-assembly-01.jpg"
	];

	const section = document.getElementById('renders');
	const slider = section && section.querySelector('#wcfSlider');
	const stage  = section && section.querySelector('#wcfStage');
	const imgEl  = section && section.querySelector('#wcfImg');
	const prev   = document.getElementById('wcfPrev');
	const next   = document.getElementById('wcfNext');
	const count  = document.getElementById('wcfCount');
	const full   = document.getElementById('wcfFull');

	const fs      = document.getElementById('wcfFs');
	const fsImg   = document.getElementById('wcfFsImg');
	const fsClose = document.getElementById('wcfFsClose');
	const fsPrev  = document.getElementById('wcfFsPrev');
	const fsNext  = document.getElementById('wcfFsNext');

	if(!slider || !stage || !imgEl || !images.length) return;

	let idx = 0;
	let inited = false;
	let touchX = 0, touchY = 0;
	let fsOpen = false;

	function pad2(n){ return String(n).padStart(2,'0'); }

	function preload(i){
	  if(images.length < 2) return;
	  const j = (i + images.length) % images.length;
	  const im = new Image(); im.decoding = "async"; im.loading = "eager"; im.src = images[j];
	}

	function setCount(){
	  if(count) count.textContent = `${pad2(idx+1)} / ${pad2(images.length)}`;
	}

	function show(i){
	  idx = (i + images.length) % images.length;
	  slider.classList.remove('loaded');
	  imgEl.src = images[idx];
	  preload(idx + 1); preload(idx - 1);
	  setCount();
	  if(fs && fs.classList.contains('show') && fsImg) fsImg.src = images[idx];
	}

	imgEl.addEventListener('load', ()=>{
	  slider.classList.add('loaded');
	  if(!slider.dataset.arSet){
		slider.dataset.arSet = "1";
		const w = imgEl.naturalWidth || 16;
		const h = imgEl.naturalHeight || 9;
		section.style.setProperty('--wcf-ar', `${w} / ${h}`);
	  }
	}, {passive:true});

	function move(d){ show(idx + d); }

	prev?.addEventListener('click', ()=> move(-1));
	next?.addEventListener('click', ()=> move(+1));

	stage.addEventListener('touchstart', (e)=>{
	  const t = e.touches && e.touches[0]; if(!t) return;
	  touchX = t.clientX; touchY = t.clientY;
	}, {passive:true});

	stage.addEventListener('touchend', (e)=>{
	  const t = e.changedTouches && e.changedTouches[0]; if(!t) return;
	  const dx = t.clientX - touchX; const dy = t.clientY - touchY;
	  if(Math.abs(dx) > 50 && Math.abs(dx) > Math.abs(dy)){ if(dx < 0) move(+1); else move(-1); }
	}, {passive:true});

	function openFs(){
	  if(fsOpen || !fs) return;
	  fsOpen = true;
	  if(fsImg) fsImg.src = images[idx];
	  fs.classList.add('show'); fs.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');
	  window.lockScroll();
	  setTimeout(()=>{ try{ fsClose && fsClose.focus(); }catch(_){} }, 0);
	}
	function closeFs(){
	  if(!fsOpen || !fs) return;
	  fsOpen = false;
	  fs.classList.remove('show'); fs.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');
	  if(fsImg) fsImg.src = '';
	  window.unlockScroll();
	}

	full?.addEventListener('click', openFs);
	stage.addEventListener('click', openFs);
	fsClose?.addEventListener('click', closeFs);
	fsPrev?.addEventListener('click', ()=> move(-1));
	fsNext?.addEventListener('click', ()=> move(+1));
	fs && fs.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{ if(e.target === fs) closeFs(); });

	fs && fs.addEventListener('touchstart', (e)=>{
	  const t = e.touches && e.touches[0]; if(!t) return;
	  touchX = t.clientX; touchY = t.clientY;
	}, {passive:true});

	fs && fs.addEventListener('touchend', (e)=>{
	  const t = e.changedTouches && e.changedTouches[0]; if(!t) return;
	  const dx = t.clientX - touchX; const dy = t.clientY - touchY;
	  if(Math.abs(dx) > 50 && Math.abs(dx) > Math.abs(dy)){ if(dx < 0) move(+1); else move(-1); }
	}, {passive:true});

	document.addEventListener('keydown', (e)=>{
	  if(!fs || !fs.classList.contains('show')) return;
	  if(e.key === 'Escape') closeFs();
	  if(e.key === 'ArrowLeft') move(-1);
	  if(e.key === 'ArrowRight') move(+1);
	});

	const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
	  if(inited) return;
	  if(!entries.some(en => en.isIntersecting)) return;
	  inited = true;
	  imgEl.fetchPriority = "high";
	  show(0);
	  const warm = ()=>{ preload(1); preload(-1); };
	  if('requestIdleCallback' in window) requestIdleCallback(warm, {timeout:800});
	  else setTimeout(warm, 250);
	  io.disconnect();
	}, { root:null, rootMargin:'300px 0px', threshold:0.01 });

	io.observe(slider);
  })();
  </script>

  <script>
	// Year
	const y = new Date().getFullYear();
	document.getElementById('year').textContent = y;
	const y2 = document.getElementById('year2');
	if(y2) y2.textContent = y;

	/* Mobile menu */
	const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menuBtn');
	const mnavBackdrop = document.getElementById('mnavBackdrop');
	const mnavClose = document.getElementById('mnavClose');
	let mnavOpen = false;

	function openMNav(){
	  if(mnavOpen) return;
	  mnavOpen = true;
	  mnavBackdrop.classList.add('show');
	  window.lockScroll();
	}
	function closeMNav(){
	  if(!mnavOpen) return;
	  mnavOpen = false;
	  mnavBackdrop.classList.remove('show');
	  window.unlockScroll();
	}

	menuBtn?.addEventListener('click', openMNav);
	mnavClose?.addEventListener('click', closeMNav);
	mnavBackdrop?.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{ if(e.target === mnavBackdrop) closeMNav(); });

	// Smooth scroll anchors + close mobile nav
	document.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{
	  const a = e.target.closest('a[href^="#"]');
	  if(!a) return;
	  if(a.classList.contains('js-open-quote')) return;
	  const id = a.getAttribute('href');
	  const el = document.querySelector(id);
	  if(!el) return;
	  e.preventDefault();
	  el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'});
	  closeMNav();
	});

	// HERO crossfade (2 images) + pause when tab hidden
	(function(){
	  const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.hero-slide');
	  if(!slides.length) return;

	  slides.forEach(s => { const im = new Image(); im.src = s.src; });

	  let i = 0;
	  const DURATION = 4200;
	  let timer = null;

	  function start(){
		if(timer) return;
		timer = setInterval(()=>{
		  slides[i].classList.remove('active');
		  i = (i + 1) % slides.length;
		  slides[i].classList.add('active');
		}, DURATION);
	  }
	  function stop(){
		if(!timer) return;
		clearInterval(timer);
		timer = null;
	  }

	  start();
	  document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', ()=>{
		if(document.hidden) stop();
		else start();
	  });
	})();

	/* Quote modal */
	const quoteModal = document.getElementById('quoteModal');
	const modalCloseBtn = document.getElementById('modalCloseBtn');
	let quoteOpen = false;

	function openQuote(){
	  if(quoteOpen) return;
	  quoteOpen = true;
	  quoteModal.classList.add('show');
	  quoteModal.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');
	  window.lockScroll();
	}
	function closeQuote(){
	  if(!quoteOpen) return;
	  quoteOpen = false;
	  quoteModal.classList.remove('show');
	  quoteModal.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');
	  window.unlockScroll();
	}

	document.querySelectorAll('.js-open-quote').forEach(el=>{
	  el.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{
		e.preventDefault();
		openQuote();
	  });
	});

	modalCloseBtn?.addEventListener('click', closeQuote);
	quoteModal?.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{ if(e.target === quoteModal) closeQuote(); });

	/* Feature carousel dots + drag scroll + infinite loop */
	(function(){
	  const track = document.getElementById('featTrack');
	  const dotsWrap = document.getElementById('featDots');
	  if(!track || !dotsWrap) return;

	  const slides = Array.from(track.querySelectorAll('.fslide'));

	  function enableDragScroll(el){
		if(!el) return;

		let isDown = false;
		let startX = 0;
		let startScrollLeft = 0;
		let moved = false;

		el.addEventListener('dragstart', (e)=>{ e.preventDefault(); });

		el.addEventListener('pointerdown', (e)=>{
		  if (e.pointerType === 'touch') return;
		  if(e.pointerType === 'mouse' && e.button !== 0) return;

		  e.preventDefault();
		  try{ window.getSelection && window.getSelection().removeAllRanges(); }catch(_){}

		  isDown = true;
		  moved = false;
		  document.body.classList.add('drag-no-select');
		  el.classList.add('dragging');

		  startX = e.clientX;
		  startScrollLeft = el.scrollLeft;

		  try{ el.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId); }catch(_){}
		}, {passive:false});

		el.addEventListener('pointermove', (e)=>{
		  if(!isDown) return;
		  const dx = e.clientX - startX;
		  if(Math.abs(dx) > 4) moved = true;
		  el.scrollLeft = startScrollLeft - dx;
		  e.preventDefault();
		}, {passive:false});

		function endDrag(e){
		  if(!isDown) return;
		  isDown = false;
		  el.classList.remove('dragging');
		  document.body.classList.remove('drag-no-select');
		  try{ el.releasePointerCapture(e.pointerId); }catch(_){}
		}

		el.addEventListener('pointerup', endDrag);
		el.addEventListener('pointercancel', endDrag);
		el.addEventListener('pointerleave', endDrag);

		el.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{
		  if(moved){
			e.preventDefault();
			e.stopPropagation();
		  }
		  moved = false;
		}, true);
	  }

	  function makeInfiniteTrack(trackEl){
		if(!trackEl) return;
		if(trackEl.dataset.infiniteInit === "1") return;
		trackEl.dataset.infiniteInit = "1";

		const GAP = parseFloat(getComputedStyle(trackEl).gap || "0");
		const originals = Array.from(trackEl.children);
		if(originals.length < 2) return;

		function getSetWidth(nodes){
		  let w = 0;
		  nodes.forEach((node, i)=>{
			w += node.getBoundingClientRect().width;
			if(i !== nodes.length - 1) w += GAP;
		  });
		  return w;
		}

		const prependClones = originals.map(n => n.cloneNode(true)).reverse();
		const appendClones  = originals.map(n => n.cloneNode(true));

		prependClones.forEach(n => trackEl.insertBefore(n, trackEl.firstChild));
		appendClones.forEach(n => trackEl.appendChild(n));

		requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
		  const setWidth = getSetWidth(originals);
		  trackEl.scrollLeft = setWidth;

		  let ticking = false;
		  trackEl.addEventListener('scroll', ()=>{
			if(ticking) return;
			ticking = true;
			requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
			  const x = trackEl.scrollLeft;
			  if(x < setWidth * 0.25){
				trackEl.scrollLeft = x + setWidth;
			  } else if(x > setWidth * 1.75){
				trackEl.scrollLeft = x - setWidth;
			  }
			  ticking = false;
			});
		  }, {passive:true});

		  let resizeTimer = null;
		  window.addEventListener('resize', ()=>{
			clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
			resizeTimer = setTimeout(()=>{
			  trackEl.innerHTML = "";
			  originals.forEach(n => trackEl.appendChild(n));
			  trackEl.dataset.infiniteInit = "0";
			  makeInfiniteTrack(trackEl);
			  buildDots();
			  setTimeout(setActiveDot, 80);
			}, 150);
		  });
		});
	  }

	  enableDragScroll(track);
	  makeInfiniteTrack(track);

	  function perView(){
		const w = window.innerWidth;
		if(w < 700) return 1;
		if(w < 1024) return 2;
		return 3;
	  }

	  function buildDots(){
		dotsWrap.innerHTML = '';
		const pv = perView();
		const pages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(slides.length / pv));

		for(let p=0; p<pages; p++){
		  const b = document.createElement('button');
		  b.className = 'dot' + (p === 0 ? ' active' : '');
		  b.type = 'button';
		  b.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Go to slide group ' + (p+1));
		  b.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
			const idx = Math.min(slides.length - 1, p * pv);
			slides[idx].scrollIntoView({ behavior:'smooth', inline:'start', block:'nearest' });
		  });
		  dotsWrap.appendChild(b);
		}
	  }

	  function setActiveDot(){
		const pv = perView();
		const dots = Array.from(dotsWrap.querySelectorAll('.dot'));
		if(!dots.length) return;

		const trackRect = track.getBoundingClientRect();
		let bestIdx = 0;
		let bestDist = Infinity;

		slides.forEach((s, i)=>{
		  const r = s.getBoundingClientRect();
		  const dist = Math.abs(r.left - trackRect.left);
		  if(dist < bestDist){ bestDist = dist; bestIdx = i; }
		});

		const page = Math.floor(bestIdx / pv);
		dots.forEach((d,i)=> d.classList.toggle('active', i === page));
	  }

	  let raf = null;
	  track.addEventListener('scroll', ()=>{
		if(raf) cancelAnimationFrame(raf);
		raf = requestAnimationFrame(setActiveDot);
	  }, {passive:true});

	  window.addEventListener('resize', ()=>{
		buildDots();
		setTimeout(setActiveDot, 80);
	  });

	  buildDots();
	  setTimeout(setActiveDot, 100);
	})();

	/* Shades carousel */
	(function(){
	  const track = document.getElementById('shadeTrack');
	  const prev = document.getElementById('shadePrev');
	  const next = document.getElementById('shadeNext');
	  const dotsWrap = document.getElementById('shadeDots');
	  if(!track || !prev || !next || !dotsWrap) return;

	  const originalSlides = Array.from(track.querySelectorAll('.shade-slide'));
	  if(!originalSlides.length) return;

	  let activePage = 0;
	  let scrollRaf = null;
	  let resizeTimer = null;
	  let midSlides = originalSlides.slice();
	  let loopSetWidth = 0;
	  let gap = 0;

	  function enableDragScroll(el){
		if(!el) return;

		let isDown = false;
		let startX = 0;
		let startScrollLeft = 0;
		let moved = false;

		el.addEventListener('dragstart', (e)=>{ e.preventDefault(); });

		el.addEventListener('pointerdown', (e)=>{
		  if(e.pointerType !== 'mouse') return;
		  if(e.button !== 0) return;
		  isDown = true;
		  moved = false;
		  el.classList.add('dragging');
		  el.style.scrollBehavior = 'auto';
		  startX = e.clientX;
		  startScrollLeft = el.scrollLeft;
		  e.preventDefault();
		  try{ el.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId); }catch(_){}
		}, {passive:false});

		el.addEventListener('pointermove', (e)=>{
		  if(!isDown) return;
		  const dx = e.clientX - startX;
		  if(Math.abs(dx) > 3) moved = true;
		  el.scrollLeft = startScrollLeft - dx;
		  e.preventDefault();
		}, {passive:false});

		function endDrag(e){
		  if(!isDown) return;
		  isDown = false;
		  el.classList.remove('dragging');
		  el.style.scrollBehavior = '';
		  try{ el.releasePointerCapture(e.pointerId); }catch(_){}
		  detectActivePage();
		}

		el.addEventListener('pointerup', endDrag);
		el.addEventListener('pointercancel', endDrag);
		el.addEventListener('pointerleave', endDrag);

		el.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{
		  if(moved){
			e.preventDefault();
			e.stopPropagation();
		  }
		  moved = false;
		}, true);
	  }

	  function perView(){
		const w = window.innerWidth;
		if(w <= 620) return 1;
		if(w <= 900) return 2;
		if(w <= 1180) return 3;
		return 4;
	  }

	  function pageCount(){
		return Math.max(1, Math.ceil(originalSlides.length / perView()));
	  }

	  function wrapPage(page){
		const pages = pageCount();
		if(!pages) return 0;
		return ((page % pages) + pages) % pages;
	  }

	  function readGap(){
		const cs = getComputedStyle(track);
		return parseFloat(cs.gap || cs.columnGap || '0') || 0;
	  }

	  function getSetWidth(nodes){
		let w = 0;
		nodes.forEach((node, i)=>{
		  w += node.getBoundingClientRect().width;
		  if(i !== nodes.length - 1) w += gap;
		});
		return w;
	  }

	  function buildDots(){
		dotsWrap.innerHTML = '';
		const pages = pageCount();
		for(let i = 0; i < pages; i++){
		  const btn = document.createElement('button');
		  btn.type = 'button';
		  btn.className = 'shade-dot' + (i === activePage ? ' active' : '');
		  btn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Go to shade group ' + (i + 1));
		  btn.addEventListener('click', ()=> goToPage(i, true));
		  dotsWrap.appendChild(btn);
		}
	  }

	  function updateControls(){
		const dots = Array.from(dotsWrap.querySelectorAll('.shade-dot'));
		dots.forEach((dot, idx)=> dot.classList.toggle('active', idx === activePage));
		prev.disabled = false;
		next.disabled = false;
	  }

	  function normalizeLoopPosition(){
		if(!loopSetWidth) return;
		const x = track.scrollLeft;
		if(x < loopSetWidth * 0.5){
		  track.scrollLeft = x + loopSetWidth;
		} else if(x > loopSetWidth * 1.5){
		  track.scrollLeft = x - loopSetWidth;
		}
	  }

	  function detectActivePage(){
		if(!midSlides.length) return;
		const trackRect = track.getBoundingClientRect();
		let bestIdx = 0;
		let bestDist = Infinity;

		midSlides.forEach((slide, idx)=>{
		  const r = slide.getBoundingClientRect();
		  const dist = Math.abs(r.left - trackRect.left);
		  if(dist < bestDist){
			bestDist = dist;
			bestIdx = idx;
		  }
		});

		activePage = wrapPage(Math.floor(bestIdx / perView()));
		updateControls();
	  }

	  function slideLeftForNode(node){
		if(!node) return 0;
		const slide = node;
		const slideRect = slide.getBoundingClientRect();
		const trackRect = track.getBoundingClientRect();
		return track.scrollLeft + (slideRect.left - trackRect.left);
	  }

	  function pageStepWidth(){
		const pv = perView();
		if(!midSlides.length) return track.clientWidth || 0;
		const idxA = 0;
		const idxB = Math.min(midSlides.length - 1, pv);
		if(idxA === idxB){
		  return midSlides[0]?.getBoundingClientRect().width || track.clientWidth || 0;
		}
		const a = slideLeftForNode(midSlides[idxA]);
		const b = slideLeftForNode(midSlides[idxB]);
		return Math.max(40, Math.abs(b - a));
	  }

	  function buildInfiniteTrack(){
		track.innerHTML = '';

		const prependClones = originalSlides.map(n => n.cloneNode(true));
		const appendClones = originalSlides.map(n => n.cloneNode(true));

		prependClones.forEach(n => {
		  n.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
		  track.appendChild(n);
		});
		originalSlides.forEach(n => track.appendChild(n));
		appendClones.forEach(n => {
		  n.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
		  track.appendChild(n);
		});

		midSlides = originalSlides.slice();
		requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
		  gap = readGap();
		  loopSetWidth = getSetWidth(midSlides);
		  if(loopSetWidth > 0){
			track.scrollLeft = loopSetWidth;
		  }
		  detectActivePage();
		});
	  }

	  function goToPage(page, smooth){
		activePage = wrapPage(page);
		if(!midSlides.length) return;
		const targetIdx = Math.min(midSlides.length - 1, activePage * perView());
		const left = slideLeftForNode(midSlides[targetIdx]);
		track.scrollTo({ left, behavior: smooth ? 'smooth' : 'auto' });
		updateControls();
	  }

	  prev.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
		track.scrollBy({ left: -pageStepWidth(), behavior: 'smooth' });
	  });
	  next.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
		track.scrollBy({ left: pageStepWidth(), behavior: 'smooth' });
	  });

	 

	  track.addEventListener('scroll', ()=>{
		if(scrollRaf) cancelAnimationFrame(scrollRaf);
		scrollRaf = requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
		  normalizeLoopPosition();
		  detectActivePage();
		});
	  }, {passive:true});

	  window.addEventListener('resize', ()=>{
		clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
		resizeTimer = setTimeout(()=>{
		  activePage = wrapPage(activePage);
		  buildDots();
		  buildInfiniteTrack();
		  setTimeout(()=> goToPage(activePage, false), 40);
		}, 120);
	  });

	  enableDragScroll(track);
	  buildDots();
	  buildInfiniteTrack();
	  setTimeout(()=> detectActivePage(), 120);
	})();

	/* PREMIUM VIEWER (Images + Videos) */
	const viewer = document.getElementById('viewer');
	const viewerStage = document.getElementById('viewerStage');
	const viewerCaption = document.getElementById('viewerCaption');
	const viewerClose = document.getElementById('viewerClose');
	const viewerPrev = document.getElementById('viewerPrev');
	const viewerNext = document.getElementById('viewerNext');

	const imageEls = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.g[data-img]'));
	const videoEls = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.vcard[data-video]'));

	const imgItems = imageEls.map(el => ({
	  type:'image',
	  src: el.dataset.img,
	  caption: el.dataset.caption || el.querySelector('.cap')?.textContent || ''
	}));

	const vidItems = videoEls.map(el => ({
	  type:'video',
	  src: el.dataset.video,
	  vtype: el.dataset.videoType || 'embed',
	  caption: el.dataset.caption || el.querySelector('.vmeta span')?.textContent || ''
	}));

	const viewerState = { mode:null, items:[], index:0, touchX:0, touchY:0 };
	let viewerOpen = false;

	function isMP4(url, vtype){
	  return (vtype === 'mp4') || /\.mp4(\?|#|$)/i.test(url);
	}

	function stopAndFreeViewerMedia(){
	  if(!viewerStage) return;
	  const videos = viewerStage.querySelectorAll('video');
	  videos.forEach(v => {
		try{ v.pause(); }catch(_){}
		try{ v.removeAttribute('src'); }catch(_){}
		try{ v.load(); }catch(_){}
		try{ v.remove(); }catch(_){}
	  });
	  const iframes = viewerStage.querySelectorAll('iframe');
	  iframes.forEach(f => {
		try{ f.src = 'about:blank'; }catch(_){}
		try{ f.remove(); }catch(_){}
	  });
	}

	function renderViewer(){
	  stopAndFreeViewerMedia();

	  const item = viewerState.items[viewerState.index];
	  if(!item) return;

	  viewerStage.innerHTML = '';
	  viewerCaption.textContent = item.caption || '';

	  const many = viewerState.items.length > 1;
	  viewerPrev.style.display = many ? 'grid' : 'none';
	  viewerNext.style.display = many ? 'grid' : 'none';

	  if(item.type === 'image'){
		const img = document.createElement('img');
		img.alt = item.caption || 'Preview image';
		img.src = item.src;
		img.decoding = 'async';
		img.loading = 'eager';
		img.draggable = false;
		viewerStage.appendChild(img);
	  } else {
		const url = item.src;
		if(isMP4(url, item.vtype)){
		  const v = document.createElement('video');
		  v.src = url;
		  v.controls = true;
		  v.playsInline = true;
		  v.setAttribute('playsinline','');
		  v.preload = 'metadata';
		  v.autoplay = true;
		  v.muted = true;
		  viewerStage.appendChild(v);
		  setTimeout(()=>{ try{ v.play(); }catch(e){} }, 30);
		} else {
		  const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
		  iframe.src = url + (url.includes('?') ? '&' : '?') + 'autoplay=1&rel=0';
		  iframe.allow = "autoplay; encrypted-media; picture-in-picture";
		  iframe.allowFullscreen = true;
		  iframe.referrerPolicy = "strict-origin-when-cross-origin";
		  viewerStage.appendChild(iframe);
		}
	  }
	}

	function openViewer(mode, index){
	  if(!viewerOpen){
		viewerOpen = true;
		window.lockScroll();
	  }
	  viewerState.mode = mode;
	  viewerState.items = (mode === 'image') ? imgItems : vidItems;
	  viewerState.index = Math.max(0, Math.min(index, viewerState.items.length - 1));
	  renderViewer();
	  viewer.classList.add('show');
	  viewer.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');
	}

	function closeViewer(){
	  if(!viewerOpen) return;
	  viewerOpen = false;
	  stopAndFreeViewerMedia();
	  viewerStage.innerHTML = '';
	  viewerCaption.textContent = '';
	  viewer.classList.remove('show');
	  viewer.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');
	  // Small delay ensures browser has repainted before restoring scroll
	  requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
		window.unlockScroll();
	  });
	}

	function moveViewer(delta){
	  const n = viewerState.items.length;
	  if(n <= 1) return;
	  viewerState.index = (viewerState.index + delta + n) % n;
	  renderViewer();
	}

	imageEls.forEach((el, idx)=> el.addEventListener('click', ()=> openViewer('image', idx)));
	videoEls.forEach((el, idx)=> el.addEventListener('click', ()=> openViewer('video', idx)));

	viewerClose?.addEventListener('click', closeViewer);
	viewerPrev?.addEventListener('click', ()=> moveViewer(-1));
	viewerNext?.addEventListener('click', ()=> moveViewer(+1));

	viewer?.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{
	  // Close when clicking the backdrop or the stage container (but not the media itself)
	  if(e.target === viewer || e.target === viewerStage) closeViewer();
	});

	viewer?.addEventListener('touchstart', (e)=>{
	  const t = e.touches?.[0];
	  if(!t) return;
	  viewerState.touchX = t.clientX;
	  viewerState.touchY = t.clientY;
	}, {passive:true});

	viewer?.addEventListener('touchend', (e)=>{
	  const t = e.changedTouches?.[0];
	  if(!t) return;
	  const dx = t.clientX - viewerState.touchX;
	  const dy = t.clientY - viewerState.touchY;
	  if(Math.abs(dx) > 50 && Math.abs(dx) > Math.abs(dy)){
		if(dx < 0) moveViewer(+1);
		else moveViewer(-1);
	  }
	}, {passive:true});

	// Floating action button toggle
	const fab = document.getElementById('fab');
	const fabMain = document.getElementById('fabMain');
	const fabIcon = document.getElementById('fabIcon');

	function setFab(open){
	  fab.classList.toggle('open', open);
	  fabMain.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(open));
	  fabIcon.className = open ? 'fa-solid fa-xmark' : 'fa-solid fa-comment-dots';
	  fabMain.setAttribute('aria-label', open ? 'Close quick actions' : 'Open quick actions');
	}

	fabMain?.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{
	  e.stopPropagation();
	  setFab(!fab.classList.contains('open'));
	});

	document.addEventListener('click', (e)=>{
	  if(fab && !fab.contains(e.target)){
		setFab(false);
	  }
	});

	// Mobile bar switch
	(function(){
	  const mq = window.matchMedia('(max-width: 900px)');
	  function apply(){ document.body.classList.toggle('is-mobile-actions', mq.matches); }
	  apply();
	  if(mq.addEventListener) mq.addEventListener('change', apply);
	  else mq.addListener(apply);
	  window.addEventListener('orientationchange', apply);
	  window.addEventListener('resize', apply);
	})();

	// ESC + keyboard navigation
	document.addEventListener('keydown', (e)=>{
	  if(e.key === 'Escape'){
		closeQuote();
		closeViewer();
		closeMNav();
		if(fab) setFab(false);
	  }
	  if(viewer.classList.contains('show')){
		if(e.key === 'ArrowLeft') moveViewer(-1);
		if(e.key === 'ArrowRight') moveViewer(+1);
	  }
	});

  </script>
